title: Calendar widget
excerpt: Can anyone tell me where to find the option for the calendar widget?  I swear I’ve searched high and low with zero luck.  Thanks!

posts.author: mcclabg (Bethany Childress)
posts.cookedHtml: Can anyone tell me where to find the option for the calendar widget? I swear I’ve searched high and low with zero luck. Thanks!

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml: After creating a new dashboard, click the blue “Add Widget” button which will populate a dropdown (First screenshot). At the bottom of this drop down, select “More Widgets” (Highlighted in the first screenshot). Then search calendar at the top (Second Screenshot) and you should be able to add this widget!

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml: If you are trying to add the calendar widget in a different part of Monday, let me know and I can try and help, but this solution should work for a dashboard
